input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.10.4.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.10.4.3
            TITLE: the vehicle must be compliant at all engine speeds up to the maximum defined test speed.

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.10.4.3: The vehicle must be compliant at all engine speeds up to the maximum defined Test Speed.
IN.10.4.3 The vehicle must be compliant at all engine speeds up to the maximum defined Test Speed.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 115 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: The vehicle must be compliant at all engine speeds up to the maximum defined Test Speed.
